metadata.name: Jacob and Esau Auto Aligns!
metadata.description: Being annoyed when Esau separated far away from Jacob just because of a tiny rock? Don't want 2x hitbox when facing boss on the side? Now they automatically aligns when shooting tears! Along shooting direction! [*] By default, when Jacob & Esau comes closer than 150 pixels, and being shooting, they will aligns (by attracting each other). Won't align when not shooting. [*] Keep shooting at one direction for 1.8s (like Epiphora) will make Jacob & Esau rotate to align along the shooting direction, Jacob in the front (press H key to swap Esau to front). Won't align if player is moving. [*] Original game supports holding Ctrl (drop button) to move Jacob only (keep Esau standing still), this mod additionally support holding Alt to move Esau only (keep Jacob standing still). [*] To change these default settings, behaviors, and key bindings use [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2681875787]Mod Config Menu[/url]. [*] See also my another funny J&E mod [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2925304303]Jacob Esau Individual Death[/url]!
